MODULE: cosmos.integration.claude_teams.swarm_team_fusion
FILE: cosmos/integration/claude_teams/swarm_team_fusion.py (690 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: SWARM TEAM FUSION - Cosmos Orchestrates Claude Teams (AGI v1.9)
====================================================================

Cosmos is the ORCHESTRATOR. Claude teams are WORKERS.

This module enables Cosmos to:
- Spawn Claude agent teams on demand
- Delegate complex tasks to Claude teams
- 

CLASSES:
- DelegationType(Enum): Types of task delegation from Cosmos to Claude teams.
- OrchestrationMode(Enum): How Cosmos orchestrates Claude teams.
- DelegationRequest: A task Cosmos delegates to Claude teams.
- OrchestrationPlan: A multi-step plan for Claude teams to execute.
- SwarmTeamFusion: Cosmos's Orchestration Layer for Claude Teams.

Cosmos maintains FULL CONTROL:
-
  Methods: def set_agent_switch(self, agent: str, enabled: bool) -> bool
  Methods: def get_agent_switches(self) -> Dict[str, bool]
  Methods: def is_agent_enabled(self, agent: str) -> bool
  Methods: def set_model_priority(self, priority: List[str]) -> None
  Methods: def get_best_available_model(self) -> Optional[ClaudeModel]
  Methods: async def delegate(self, task: str, delegation_type: DelegationType=DelegationType.ANALYSIS, model: 
  Methods: async def delegate_to_team(self, task: str, team_name: str, team_purpose: str, roles: Optional[List[
  Methods: async def create_orchestration_plan(self, name: str, tasks: List[Dict[str, Any]], mode: Orchestratio

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_swarm_team_fusion() -> SwarmTeamFusion
- async def cosmos_delegate(task: str, task_type: str='analysis', model: str='sonnet') -> str
- async def cosmos_team_task(task: str, team_name: str='task_force') -> Dict[str, Any]
